item.description: Join us for an illuminating talk all about bioluminescence. This event is free and streamed live on our YouTube channel.
item.name: Lightning Talks: Bioluminescence

item.description: Sofia Dartnell (University of Cambridge) shares her research looking at the lifecycles and impacts of cuckoo bumblebees.
item.name: Can Infiltrators be Indicators? Understanding Cuckoo Bumblebees

item.description: A Guided Hands-on Workshop on Modern Linux Administration with AI tools and AI Agents
item.name: Agentic Linux – From Commands to AI Agents

item.description: Mark Solms examines the science of psychoanalysis and asks if Freud was more right than he’s often given credit for.
item.name: The real science of psychoanalysis (Online)

item.description: Join Dr Jennifer Jones online to discover new research about cave bear diet and extinction, and how this knowledge can help bears today.
item.name: Why did the cave bears become extinct and what can we learn from them?

item.description: Insights from MIT experts on the technologies, markets, and systems shaping the future of urban mobility.
item.name: Five Transformations in Urban Mobility

item.description: Beginner-friendly video editing for freelancers who want to look like they have a whole team.
item.name: Edit Reels Like a Pro

item.description: Discover why adults with AuDHD are often prone to burnout, and leave with practical strategies to help prevent it. Followed by Q&A.
item.name: AuDHD & Burnout

meta_description: Online events are amazing opportunities to have fun and learn. Find new online science & tech events on Eventbrite.
